payload.prompt: Project-wide style contract: RPG game art first, cute colorful pixel-art map readability, limited cohesive palette, clean silhouettes, low-noise symbolic detail, crisp hand-placed pixels. RPG pixel art style, game sprite, single character, centered composition on the configured chroma-key background, clear readable silhouette, strong pose, limited color palette, no scenery or background details, RPG overworld readability, top-down orthographic game view, native low-resolution RPG sprite design, readable at 128x128 and 64x64, chunky pixel clusters, large simple color blocks, crisp hard pixel edges, bold 1-2 pixel dark outline, simplified ornament shapes, avoid tiny high-frequency costume details, avoid soft painterly shading, 64x64 pixel game asset Generation background contract: use a flat solid chroma-key background with exact RGB(255,0,255), hex #FF00FF, filling every cell behind the subject. This is not final transparency; alpha transparency is created only by post-processing. Keep RGB(255,0,255) / #FF00FF out of the character, object, weapon, outfit, highlights, and effects. 16-frame four-direction walking sprite sheet arranged in a strict 4x4 grid. Each row is one direction and each column is one walk-cycle frame. Row 1: facing down/front. Row 2: facing left. Row 3: facing right. Row 4: facing up/back. Keep the same character, outfit, armor, cape, weapon, shield, silhouette, proportions, palette, and pixel-art rendering across every frame. One complete full-body sprite per cell, centered with equal padding, no overlap, no merged bodies, no labels, no scenery beyond the configured chroma-key background. ornate cat warrior carrying a long spear, same role as the approved static sprite: a heroic anthropomorphic cat warrior with ornate fantasy armor, compact RPG overworld proportions, one long spear held consistently, readable cat ears and tail, colorful but controlled costume, cute serious expression, no extra characters, body-only sprite frames, no attack effects, no motion trails. Keep the spear, armor silhouette, face markings, tail shape, color palette, and body scale consistent across all frames. Use clean RPG pixel-art animation poses with stable feet anchor and centered body in each cell. column 1: contact pose, left foot forward, opposite arm forward column 2: passing pose, feet closer together, body slightly raised column 3: contact pose, right foot forward, opposite arm forward column 4: passing pose, feet closer together, body slightly lowered Create one image only. Target canvas: 1024x1024. Frame layout: walk_4dir, grid=4x4. Strictly follow the grid. Return only the image. avoid: non-RPG style, photorealistic material texture, raw texture scan, generic texture sample, 3d render, noisy gritty surface, cinematic scene painting, realistic, photorealistic, blurry, noisy, background clutter, multiple characters, text, watermark, 3d render, anime portrait, realistic proportions, high-resolution illustration, soft brushwork, airbrushed gradients, tiny jewelry details, dense micro details, transparent background, checkerboard transparency grid, fake transparency, gradient background, textured background, scenery, floor plane, cast shadow, contact shadow, white background, black background, using RGB(255,0,255) or #FF00FF on the subject, inconsistent character identity, different armor, different cape, different shield emblem, different weapon, mismatched scale, diagonal view, isometric view, merged figures, overlapping sprites, missing cell separation, text labels, frame numbers
